title: Upside Down Swords
description: this texture pack changes the swords and flips them
body:
this texture pack changes the swords and flips them. like this 
![Diamond Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/801caa700620d4f1db68ba9d44be137e2cd5a77e.png)![Diamond Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4075dff8629f007c135338ccfd7cce7b7f82eb9d.png)

this texture pack does not need optifine.

this texture pack is compatible with all versions from 1.21.5 to 1.15
